# v0.9 External Reviewer Packet

## What to Review

Please review the public project materials only:

- `README.md`
- `SKILL.md`
- `examples/public-demo.md`
- `examples/public-demo-outputs.md`
- `launch/x-thread-cn.md`
- `launch/github-announcement.md`
- `AUTHORIZATION.md`
- v0.7 lowbrow calibration sections
- safety boundaries

## What We Need Feedback On

- 像不像峰哥
- 是否仍像普通 AI
- 是否过度低俗
- 是否有“下三路牵引”但没有越界
- 是否容易被误解成峰哥实时本人声明
- 是否 candidate / verified 区分清楚
- README 是否容易理解
- launch copy 是否适合公开发

## What Not to Send

- 私聊截图
- 私人授权材料
- 未公开资料
- 长字幕
- 隐私信息
- 他人个人信息
- 未授权照片

## Feedback Format

Use `reviews/external/feedback-form.md`.

Feedback should be summarized into `reviews/external/feedback-log.csv` without recording private identity details or private-message text.
